title: Test Externalize Config Phase 3
description: Verify all Phase 3 config externalization changes: scheduler reads from config, skills uses config-driven backend dirs, prompts supports overridable agent types and templates dir. Confirm fallback behavior when config.yaml is absent. Confirm all existing tests still pass.
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass with uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
Scheduler correctly uses config values for lease timeout, corrective attempts, transient patterns, followup suffixes
prepare_isolated_execution_root uses config-driven skills directories for both backends
prompts functions accept and use optional config overrides
Default fallback behavior works when no config is provided
